issues.description: Wrong trigger type. The effect text 'If you have a [Sarfunkel], this Character gains [Blocker]' is a continuous conditional effect that applies while the condition is true, not a triggered OnPlay effect. This should use the 'Activated' trigger which represents continuous/static abilities.

Wrong duration. Since this is a continuous conditional effect (gains Blocker while you control Sarfunkel), the duration should be 'WhileConditionMet' or similar continuous duration, not 'Permanent'. The keyword should be lost when Sarfunkel leaves the board.
